name: frad-dotclaude
description: Frad's Claude Code plugin marketplace featuring specialized agents and workflow automation

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Conventional Git automation and advanced repository management

plugins.name: gitflow
plugins.description: GitFlow workflow automation for feature, hotfix, and release branches with post-finish cleanup

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub project operations with quality gates

plugins.name: swiftui
plugins.description: SwiftUI code review with modern API best practices

plugins.name: office
plugins.description: Office productivity skills for patent applications, PRD generation, image and video generation, Feishu document creation, browser automation, Lark/Feishu CLI operations, and AI writing trope detection

plugins.name: refactor
plugins.description: Agent and skills for code simplification and refactoring to improve code quality while preserving functionality

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Advanced development workflow orchestration with BDD support and self-improving skills

plugins.name: plugin-optimizer
plugins.description: Validates and optimizes Claude Code plugins against official best practices and file patterns

plugins.name: frontend
plugins.description: Web frontend development toolkit — shadcn/ui, Next.js DevTools, React best practices, Supabase, DESIGN.md design system spec, and impeccable design skills

plugins.name: acpx
plugins.description: Knowledge base for acpx - a headless ACP CLI for agent-to-agent communication

plugins.name: code-context
plugins.description: Retrieve code context for any repo, library, or natural-language query via DeepWiki, Context7, Exa, git clone, and web search+fetch

plugins.name: utils
plugins.description: General-purpose utility skills for documentation, writing, and project maintenance

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous research loop inspired by karpathy/autoresearch — give it a plain-language goal and it infers the artifact, evaluator (numeric scorer / objective gate / LLM rubric), and bounds, then iterates: cheap sequential rounds that escalate to a parallel GAN tournament when they plateau

plugins.name: antigravity
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and deep research to Google Gemini Managed Agents (Antigravity) running in a remote sandbox, then read the results back

plugins.name: storm
plugins.description: Wikipedia-style long-form article generation via multi-perspective question asking and retrieval — a Claude-native port of Stanford STORM's two-stage research-to-article pipeline

plugins.name: hardware
plugins.description: Hardware and EDA toolkit. Drives the KiCad CLI for schematic/PCB export and checks, and OpenSCAD for parametric 3D/2D part design and STL/DXF/PNG output.
